Montana Department of Public Health & Human Services
Rural Health Transformation Program Center of Excellence
Integrated analytics platform · CMS HCRIS · CDC PLACES 2023 · CMS Market Saturation 2024 · Hospital Service Area Data
Montana RHTP · Center of Excellence · Analytics Platform
Transforming Rural Health Through Data-Driven Decision Making

Montana faces one of the most acute rural health crises in the nation. 89% of rural hospitals operate at negative margins, 30+ counties have zero psychotherapy providers, and Medicare patient out-migration from rural communities exceeds 40% in many service areas — meaning rural Montanans travel hundreds of miles for care that should be available locally.

The RHTP Center of Excellence integrates data from CMS cost reports, CDC PLACES, CMS Market Saturation, and Hospital Service Area files to give state planners, CoE analysts, and rural health leaders a unified view of where demand exceeds supply, where financial viability is at risk, and where workforce gaps are most severe.

Select any dashboard below or use the navigation bar above to explore the data.

Analytics Dashboards — Click to Open
Data sources: CMS HCRIS Hospital Cost Reports (2020–2024) · CDC PLACES 2023 (age-adjusted prevalence) · CMS Medicare Market Saturation & Utilization Data 2024 · CMS Hospital Service Area File · Montana DPHHS · RFP BPM056285. Platform developed in support of Montana RHTP CoE proposal.
